serverInfo.name: Hilmost Toolbox
serverInfo.description: Free, privacy-first browser-side utility tools for developers and everyday users. No sign-up, no servers, no data collection.

tools.name: password-generator
tools.description: Generate cryptographically secure passwords using crypto.getRandomValues(). Supports custom length, character types, bulk generation.

tools.name: qr-code-generator
tools.description: Generate QR codes for URLs, Wi-Fi, email, phone and vCard contacts. PNG and SVG export. Real-time scannability scoring.

tools.name: text-case-converter
tools.description: Convert text between 15 case formats including Title Case, camelCase, snake_case, Slugify and more, with Find & Replace and Custom Terms Override.

tools.name: time-zone-converter
tools.description: Convert times across multiple time zones with DST awareness, meeting overlap grid, and shareable team clock URLs.

tools.name: color-picker
tools.description: Visually pick colors and convert between HEX, RGB and HSL. Generate harmonious palettes, check WCAG contrast ratios, and save color history.

tools.name: gpa-calculator
tools.description: Calculate semester and cumulative GPA using letter grades, percentages or grade points. Supports 4.0 and 5.0 weighted scales.

tools.name: calorie-macro-calculator
tools.description: Calculate BMR, TDEE, and daily macronutrient targets (Protein/Carbs/Fats) for weight loss, maintenance, or gain. Supports custom macro splits.

tools.name: sleep-cycle-calculator
tools.description: Calculate optimal wake up and bed times based on 90-minute sleep cycles to avoid sleep inertia and wake up refreshed.
